summary: Two coupled changes: (1) CycleService.Check gains a release-scoped null-state branch (BugOnlyReleaseCheck) delegating bug-only release readiness to the bug-aware release train (BuildReleaseTrain(null)), consistent with 033; (2) an adversarial 3-lens verification surfaced that Stamp consumes the SAME chokepoint via EnsurePrerequisitesFresh, so CycleService.Stamp gains a RefuseBugOnlyReleaseStamp guard that fails a release stamp on a null-state repo closed before the first git touch — neither path fabricates a cycle-state.
